title: IngestibleTwitter
description: Schema for IngestibleTwitter in Nuix REST API

accessToken.description: The access token of your twitter app. You can create a new app at https://apps.twitter.com and generate this if you don't have one already.

accessTokenSecret.description: The access token secret of your twitter app. You can create a new app at https://apps.twitter.com and generate this if you don't have one already.

consumerKey.description: The consumer key (API key) of your twitter app. You can create a new app at https://apps.twitter.com and generate this if you don't have one already.

consumerSecret.description: The consumer secret (API secret) of your twitter app. You can create a new app at https://apps.twitter.com and generate this if you don't have one already.
